title: ononis diffusa var. micrantha
intro: Ononis diffusa var. micrantha, commonly known as small-leaf burnet or small-flowered burnet, is a variety of the burnet plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ononis diffusa var. micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat urinary problems, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
